text: Did you catch that CMS is expanding the diet quality metrics for inpatient reimbursement? Adler forwarded the full brief this morning, Ashfield's going to be restructuring protocols by Q4.
I saw it. The timing is genuinely terrible. Who's even going to lead the implementation review?
That's the question. Kevin thinks I'm catastrophizing but he doesn't deal with our chart volume. The staffing situation alone is a headache.
Admin never does lol. Did you see the Senate hearing on food dye bans trending today though?
Yes. Half my Bowie caseload parents are already texting me asking what to do. Red 40 isn't the enemy, ultra-processed everything is the enemy.
That's such a hard message to land when the headlines are screaming 'BAN THE DYES.' Nuance doesn't trend.
Never does. There's also a new meta-analysis out on GLP-1 durability post-discontinuation, actually worth reading, not just the press version.
Send it? I need something legit to cite at rounds Friday instead of whatever the attendings pulled off a news alert.
Did you see Jamie's post about that new meal kit service? You should drop a comment, she's got the macros all wrong and I'm not about to let that slide on my feed 😂
Jess posted about 'detox teas' flushing toxins after a holiday weekend 😒 I can't just scroll past that. Should I reply or let it go, I already drafted something.
Did you see Jess's post about that 'anti-inflammatory diet'? I'm commenting, as a dietitian I literally cannot scroll past that 😅 some of it's actually solid though.
Nancy did you see Linda's post about that Bowie farmers market pop-up? You should comment, she'd love hearing from you! Kevin and I were just talking about stopping by Saturday.

Sarah did you see Jen's post about that 'carnivore diet cured my insulin resistance' thing? I'm halfway through a reply and Kevin is literally telling me to put the phone down lol. Do I respond or no?
James did you see Sarah posted that new NEJM piece on low-carb vs Mediterranean for glycemic control? Tagging you because you'll have thoughts 😂

Saw Denise's post about 'detox teas' and could not let it stand 😒 Left a comment, Kevin said scroll past but I'm a dietitian, that's literally my job. People in Bowie are out here spending $40 on laxatives.
Did you see Maya's post about the low-carb study? Left a comment, the glycemic index point she glossed over actually matters clinically. Figured you'd weigh in too from the foot health side. 😄
Nii, did you see Keisha's post about IF curing everything? Already replied, couldn't let it slide. Ashfield's got me on permanent nutrition misinformation patrol 😄
Did you see Maya's post about the recital? Left a quick comment but it got me thinking, Kyle's been bugging me about lessons again, might finally just book him a slot with you 😄
